title: Why Simple Tasks Feel So Complicated Online
content:
Somehow, the simplest tasks online are the most frustrating.

You open a tool expecting a quick result…

…and end up dealing with:
	•	slow loading
	•	unnecessary steps
	•	endless popups

All for something that should take seconds.

It’s strange how often “simple” turns into “complicated.”

Maybe the problem isn’t the task —
it’s how tools are designed.
